item.title: 我在水冷头上打赢了虎先锋！钛钽新水冷LG700 PRO上手评测【翼王】
item.itunes:title: 我在水冷头上打赢了虎先锋！钛钽新水冷LG700 PRO上手评测【翼王】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2TLk5d6Xt-w 这次我们要来上手评测一下钛钽TCOMAS的带屏幕的新水冷产品，LG-700 PRO。 BGM： Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U

Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2TLk5d6Xt-w 这次我们要来上手评测一下钛钽TCOMAS的带屏幕的新水冷产品，LG-700 PRO。 BGM： Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. item.title: 便宜SFX电源能买吗？性价比650W SFX电源大横评【翼王】
item.itunes:title: 便宜SFX电源能买吗？性价比650W SFX电源大横评【翼王】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MnqOeK7I8q4 因为各种原因SFX电源的价格一直高高在上，对于很多ITX玩家来说，便宜的SFX电源是比较迫切的需求，所以这次我们带来了一期650W性价比SFX电源的横评视频。 BGM: Track: Introspection — Mona Wonderlick [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/UZzuVt7nKOA Free Download / Stream: http://alplus.io/Introspection Song: LiQWYD - Free Music provided by LiQWYD. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/flpBtykbMJc Song: Justhea - Vibe Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/apg79FNFkz4 Song: Sappheiros - Lights Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/dfL3jM6Pt_4 Song: Sappheiros - You Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/E30pRP_sdAY Song: Ikson - Sunny (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/AoVFxsFvD5o Song: Ikson - Spring (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/xSZU2XMUAYY Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow

item.title: 槽点爆满?! PDD上超便宜的双触屏笔记本电脑开箱试玩【开箱翼闻录 第55期】
item.itunes:title: 槽点爆满?! PDD上超便宜的双触屏笔记本电脑开箱试玩【开箱翼闻录 第55期】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kl4YXHbq9Zo 刷PDD时被推送了一台只要2000出头的双屏幕笔记本 ，而且还是双触摸屏，看了一下详情页感觉槽点满满，就买回来开箱看看了。 BGM： Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kl4YXHbq9Zo 刷PDD时被推送了一台只要2000出头的双屏幕笔记本 ，而且还是双触摸屏，看了一下详情页感觉槽点满满，就买回来开箱看看了。 BGM： Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. item.title: ¥599 ATX3 1000W 10年保修？超卷的九州风神黄金统治者PQ-1000G电源拆解评测【翼王】
item.itunes:title: ¥599 ATX3 1000W 10年保修？超卷的九州风神黄金统治者PQ-1000G电源拆解评测【翼王】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6R4QmirVDe4 这一次我们来上手评测一下看起来性价比爆高的九州风神的PQ-G系列——黄金统治者电源。 BGM： Let's Change The World Together by Artificial.Music https://soundcloud.com/artificial-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/RaJ7rUEkj_4 Paraclet by Amarià https://soundcloud.com/amariamusique Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/lSguSF985Y4 Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Song: Atch - Found You Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/G774NKvUm88

item.title: USB4高速硬盘盒只要两百多了？谁才是小姐姐们的移动房车最优选？【翼王工作室】
item.itunes:title: USB4高速硬盘盒只要两百多了？谁才是小姐姐们的移动房车最优选？【翼王工作室】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tyICPPht07c 这次我们自费购买了市面上六款主控为ASM2464的USB4硬盘盒，横向对比哪款的使用体验最佳，每款硬盘盒又有哪些特点。 BGM： Starry Night by Couple N https://soundcloud.com/couple-n-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/rYjQAzZfpMw Hustle by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/hGzGcWVQlpI Chill Guitar / Flamingo by jlsmrl https://soundcloud.com/jlsmrl Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/chill-guitar-flamingo Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/a1XmwxH0BPw Song: Justhea - Vibe Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/apg79FNFkz4 Moody by Jay Someday https://soundcloud.com/jaysomeday Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/_moody Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/WJHTZpx9d2o Track: Wanderlust — CRASTEL [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/79mSePaZkOU Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/wanderlust Song: Jim Yosef - Link [NCS Release] Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds. Watch: https://youtu.be/9iHM6X6uUH8 Download/Stream: http://ncs.io/LinkYO New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Song: LiQWYD - Work It Out Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/T-dL1urgZHA
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tyICPPht07c 这次我们自费购买了市面上六款主控为ASM2464的USB4硬盘盒，横向对比哪款的使用体验最佳，每款硬盘盒又有哪些特点。 BGM： Starry Night by Couple N https://soundcloud.com/couple-n-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/rYjQAzZfpMw Hustle by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/hGzGcWVQlpI Chill Guitar / Flamingo by jlsmrl https://soundcloud.com/jlsmrl Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/chill-guitar-flamingo Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/a1XmwxH0BPw Song: Justhea - Vibe Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/apg79FNFkz4 Moody by Jay Someday https://soundcloud.com/jaysomeday Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/_moody Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/WJHTZpx9d2o Track: Wanderlust — CRASTEL [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/79mSePaZkOU Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/wanderlust Song: Jim Yosef - Link [NCS Release] Music provided by NoCopyrightSounds. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/T-dL1urgZHA
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tyICPPht07c 这次我们自费购买了市面上六款主控为ASM2464的USB4硬盘盒，横向对比哪款的使用体验最佳，每款硬盘盒又有哪些特点。 BGM： Starry Night by Couple N https://soundcloud.com/couple-n-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/rYjQAzZfpMw Hustle by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/hGzGcWVQlpI Chill Guitar / Flamingo by jlsmrl https://soundcloud.com/jlsmrl Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/chill-guitar-flamingo Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/a1XmwxH0BPw Song: Justhea - Vibe Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music.
